title: SVGD
description: SVGD modpack is designed for survival content creators and regular players, offering optimized performance, quality-of-life improvements, and enhanced visuals  without sacrificing FPS for a smooth and immersive Minecraft experience!
body:
# SVGD – The Ultimate Content Creator Modpack

**SVGD is a curated modpack built specifically for Minecraft content creators who want a perfect balance of visual quality, performance optimization, and essential tools for Survival and Hardcore gameplay. Whether you're capturing cinematic adventures or streaming intense survival moments, SVGD offers the ideal environment to engage and impress your audience**

### Key Features:
10 Handpicked Shaders:
A collection of stunning shaders optimized for both beauty and performance, giving your world rich lighting, shadows, and atmosphere.

**19 High-Quality Resource Packs:**
Carefully selected packs that enhance textures without sacrificing FPS, maintaining the core Minecraft feel with polished visuals.

**Minimalist Custom GUIs:**
Clean, player-friendly interfaces designed for immersion and usability during recording or streaming.

- Enhanced Survival Experience:

- Improved beds for better interaction and visuals

- Realistic water droplets for environmental detail

- Immersive sound and environmental tweaks

- Performance & Utility Mods:

- FPS Boost mods for smoother gameplay

- Flashback mod to capture key moments

- Better F3 for cleaner, more informative debugging

- Shulker Tooltip to view contents without opening boxes

- Chat Heads for better conversation visibility

- Essential Mod for multiplayer tools and features

- Integrated Voice Chat for real-time communication

 
![Doors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/101f50e414c631551c14a2e5ff5d641fdfafd744.jpeg)
